name: Tiramisu - Buon'appetito
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy pot over medium-low heat, whisk together sugar and eggs until frothy. Continue whisking until the mixture begins to thicken. Whisk in 1/4 cup Marsala Wine and cook until the mixture coats the back of a spoon. Scrape into a bowl and reserve.
2. Whip the cream until it holds its shape. With the same beaters, whisk mascarpone cheese and lemon rind together until the mixture softens. Fold in the egg/Marsala mixture and whipping cream.
3. Combine espresso coffee and remaining 1/4 cup Marsala Wine. Dip lady fingers into the coffee mixture two at a time and soak evenly. Place a layer of soaked lady fingers on the bottom of an 11x7 inch dish. Spread with half of the mascarpone cream. Sprinkle with grated chocolate. Add another layer of soaked lady fingers. Top with mascarpone cream and remaining chocolate.
